name: octocode-mcp
description: Code research MCP server for GitHub, npm, local files, LSP semantics, and OQL workflows
long_description: MCP server with code research tools across GitHub, npm, local files, LSP semantics, and OQL. Agents orient, search, read exact evidence, and prove findings with typed continuations and sanitized output.

tools.name: mcp_octocode_ghGetFileContent
tools.description: Fetch file content from GitHub repositories

tools.name: mcp_octocode_ghHistoryResearch
tools.description: Search pull requests or commit history

tools.name: mcp_octocode_ghCloneRepo
tools.description: Clone a GitHub repository or subtree for local analysis

tools.name: mcp_octocode_npmSearch
tools.description: Search npm packages and source repositories

tools.name: mcp_octocode_localSearchCode
tools.description: Search local code with ripgrep or structural AST patterns

tools.name: mcp_octocode_localFindFiles
tools.description: Find local files by name, path, metadata, and glob filters

tools.name: mcp_octocode_localGetFileContent
tools.description: Read local file content with minification and exact slices

tools.name: mcp_octocode_lspGetSemantics
tools.description: Run LSP semantic navigation over local files

tools.name: mcp_octocode_oqlSearch
tools.description: Run OQL research workflows with typed continuations

github_token.title: GitHub Token
github_token.description: Personal access token for GitHub API (optional, increases rate limits)
